welcome.title: Welcome to Tallam
welcome.subtitle: Comprehensive Management System for Quranic Education & Memorization Programs

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your educational institution efficiently
features.quran_management_desc: Track and manage Quran memorization progress, parts, and sessions with ease
features.education_programs_desc: Organize and manage educational programs for students and entities
features.user_management_desc: Complete user system with roles, permissions, and activity tracking
features.entity_management_desc: Manage branches, entities, teachers, and students all in one place
features.analytics_desc: Get insights with comprehensive analytics and detailed reporting tools
features.notifications_desc: Send automated notifications and keep everyone informed in real-time

about.title: About Tallam
about.description: Tallam is a modern, comprehensive management system designed specifically for Quranic education institutions. Manage every aspect of your educational institution from one centralized platform.
about.feature1: Streamlined administration for entities, branches, and programs
about.feature2: Advanced tracking for student progress and memorization

quick_start.title: Quick Start Guide
quick_start.description: Get started with Tallam in just a few simple steps
quick_start.step1_desc: Use the sidebar menu to access different sections of the system
quick_start.step2_desc: Start by managing entities, students, or programs from the main sections
